div.style: display: table-cell; vertical-align: middle; width: 65%; text-align: right; font-size: 9.5px; line-height: 1.35; color: #212529;
border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-left: 3px solid #079000; border-radius: 3px; padding: 10px 14px; background-color: #f8f9fa;

th.style: background-color: #f1f3f5; color: #212529; padding: 6px 8px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; font-weight: 700; border-bottom: 2px solid #079000;
background-color: #f1f3f5; color: #212529; padding: 6px 8px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; font-weight: 700; border-bottom: 2px solid #079000;
background-color: #f1f3f5; color: #212529; padding: 6px 8px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; font-weight: 700; border-bottom: 2px solid #079000;
background-color: #f1f3f5; color: #212529; padding: 6px 8px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; font-weight: 700; border-bottom: 2px solid #079000;

td.style: padding: 6px 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid #dee2e6; color: #212529;
padding: 6px 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid #dee2e6; color: #212529;
padding: 6px 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid #dee2e6; color: #212529;
padding: 6px 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid #dee2e6;

t.div: No hay facturas pendientes ni pagos sin aplicar a la fecha de corte.

div.style: page-break-inside: avoid; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 4px; padding: 12px 14px; margin-top: 14px; background-color: #ffffff; color: #212529;
border-bottom: 2px solid #079000; padding-bottom: 4px; margin-bottom: 8px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: #079000;

th.style: background-color: #f1f3f5; color: #212529; padding: 6px 8px; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 700; text-align: left; border-bottom: 2px solid #079000;
background-color: #f1f3f5; color: #212529; padding: 6px 8px; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 700; text-align: left; border-bottom: 2px solid #079000;
background-color: #f1f3f5; color: #212529; padding: 6px 8px; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 700; text-align: left; border-bottom: 2px solid #079000;

background-color: #f1f3f5; color: #212529; padding: 6px 8px; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 700; text-align: right; white-space: nowrap; border-bottom: 2px solid #079000;

background-color: #f1f3f5; color: #212529; padding: 6px 8px; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 700; text-align: right; white-space: nowrap; border-bottom: 2px solid #079000;

background-color: #f1f3f5; color: #212529; padding: 6px 8px; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 700; text-align: right; white-space: nowrap; border-bottom: 2px solid #079000;

td.style: padding: 5px 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid #dee2e6;
padding: 5px 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid #dee2e6; white-space: nowrap;
padding: 5px 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid #dee2e6; white-space: nowrap;

td.t-att-style: 'padding: 5px 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid #dee2e6; text-align: right; white-space: nowrap;' + (' color: #dc2626; font-weight: 700;' if inv['days_overdue'] > 0 else ' color: #212529;')

td.style: padding: 5px 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid #dee2e6; text-align: right; white-space: nowrap;
padding: 5px 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid #dee2e6; text-align: right; white-space: nowrap;
padding: 7px 8px; background-color: #f1f3f5; color: #212529; font-weight: 700; text-align: right; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; font-size: 10.5px; border-top: 2px solid #079000;
padding: 7px 8px; background-color: #f1f3f5; color: #212529; font-weight: 700; text-align: right; white-space: nowrap; border-top: 2px solid #079000;
padding: 7px 8px; background-color: #f1f3f5; color: #079000; font-weight: 700; text-align: right; white-space: nowrap; border-top: 2px solid #079000;

div.style: font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: #af8624; margin-top: 10px; margin-bottom: 4px;

th.style: background-color: #f9efd4; color: #212529; padding: 5px 8px; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 700; text-align: left; border-bottom: 2px solid #af8624;
background-color: #f9efd4; color: #212529; padding: 5px 8px; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 700; text-align: left; border-bottom: 2px solid #af8624;

background-color: #f9efd4; color: #212529; padding: 5px 8px; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 700; text-align: right; white-space: nowrap; border-bottom: 2px solid #af8624;

background-color: #f9efd4; color: #212529; padding: 5px 8px; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 700; text-align: right; white-space: nowrap; border-bottom: 2px solid #af8624;

td.style: padding: 5px 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid #dee2e6;
padding: 5px 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid #dee2e6; white-space: nowrap;
padding: 5px 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid #dee2e6; text-align: right; white-space: nowrap;
padding: 5px 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid #dee2e6; text-align: right; white-space: nowrap;
padding: 7px 8px; background-color: #f9efd4; color: #212529; font-weight: 700; text-align: right; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; font-size: 10.5px; border-top: 2px solid #af8624;
padding: 7px 8px; background-color: #f9efd4; color: #af8624; font-weight: 700; text-align: right; white-space: nowrap; border-top: 2px solid #af8624;

table.style: display: inline-table; border-collapse: collapse; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 3px;

th.style: background-color: #f1f3f5; color: #212529; padding: 4px 12px; font-size: 9.5px; letter-spacing: 0.03em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 700; text-align: right; white-space: nowrap;
background-color: #f1f3f5; color: #212529; padding: 4px 12px; font-size: 9.5px; letter-spacing: 0.03em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 700; text-align: right; white-space: nowrap;
background-color: #f1f3f5; color: #212529; padding: 4px 12px; font-size: 9.5px; letter-spacing: 0.03em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 700; text-align: right; white-space: nowrap;
background-color: #f1f3f5; color: #212529; padding: 4px 12px; font-size: 9.5px; letter-spacing: 0.03em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 700; text-align: right; white-space: nowrap;
background-color: #f1f3f5; color: #212529; padding: 4px 12px; font-size: 9.5px; letter-spacing: 0.03em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 700; text-align: right; white-space: nowrap;
background-color: #079000; color: #ffffff; padding: 4px 12px; font-size: 9.5px; letter-spacing: 0.03em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 700; text-align: right; white-space: nowrap;

td.style: padding: 5px 12px; text-align: right; white-space: nowrap; border-top: 1px solid #dee2e6; color: #212529;
padding: 5px 12px; text-align: right; white-space: nowrap; border-top: 1px solid #dee2e6; color: #212529;
padding: 5px 12px; text-align: right; white-space: nowrap; border-top: 1px solid #dee2e6; color: #212529;
padding: 5px 12px; text-align: right; white-space: nowrap; border-top: 1px solid #dee2e6; color: #212529;
padding: 5px 12px; text-align: right; white-space: nowrap; border-top: 1px solid #dee2e6; color: #212529;
padding: 5px 12px; text-align: right; white-space: nowrap; border-top: 1px solid #dee2e6; background-color: #f0f8ec; font-weight: 700; color: #079000;

div.style: clear: both; text-align: right; font-size: 12px; border-top: 1px solid #dee2e6; padding-top: 8px; margin-top: 10px; color: #212529;

div.p:
Si ya realizó el pago, por favor omita este aviso. Para cualquier consulta escríbanos a
o comuníquese al .
